description: This Java class is a Spring Boot REST controller managing endpoints for supporting document upload, listing, download, metadata update, and deletion. It uses annotations for API documentation and security, and interacts with a supporting document service.

classes.name: SupportingDocumentController
classes.description: A Spring REST controller that provides secure endpoints for managing supporting documents, including upload, list, download, metadata update, and delete functions, with JWT based authentication.

methods.name: upload
methods.description: Handles uploading a new supporting document for the authenticated user, with optional metadata and loan draft linkage.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Returns a list of supporting documents belonging to the authenticated user, optionally filtered by loan draft ID.

methods.name: updateMetadata
methods.description: Replaces the metadata JSON for a specified document owned by the user.

methods.name: download
methods.description: Allows the authenticated user to download the document file by document ID.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes the specified document along with its metadata and file content for the authenticated user.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts and validates the user ID from the Authentication object, expecting a UUID string.
